message:
feat(mvcc): implement OpenFs request scope snapshot lifecycle hooks (bd-13di)

ffs-core/src/lib.rs:
- Implement begin_request_scope for OpenFs: pins the current MVCC
  snapshot by calling current_snapshot() and registering it with the
  mvcc_store, returning a RequestScope carrying the pinned snapshot.
  This ensures FUSE request handlers operate against a consistent
  point-in-time view of the filesystem even as concurrent writes
  create new MVCC versions.
- Implement end_request_scope for OpenFs: releases the pinned snapshot
  from mvcc_store, logging a warning if the snapshot was already released
  (indicating a double-release bug). Returns Ok(()) for empty scopes.
- Add trace-level MVCC logging for both begin and end operations,
  including the operation type and snapshot high watermark.
- Add test request_scope_registers_and_releases_snapshot: verifies that
  begin_request_scope increments active_snapshot_count to 1, the scope
  carries a snapshot but no transaction, and end_request_scope decrements
  the count back to 0.
- Add test end_request_scope_accepts_empty_scope: verifies that calling
  end_request_scope with RequestScope::empty() is a harmless no-op.

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Track new issue bd-13di (Implement OpenFs request scope snapshot
  lifecycle hooks) with status in_progress, priority 1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
